name: transportation_technology_heat_dome_southport_rig_utl
premise: A contractual SLA is about to breach; the least-bad mitigation option touches privacy, safety, or fairness in uncomfortable ways. In Transportation Technology, the situation tagged internally around transportation technology heat dome southport rig utl has converged with local pressure in the Transportation corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both rights and utility; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Luc Mensah
agents.identity: I am Luc Mensah, the accountable executive on this bridge in Transportation Technology. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat utility as disposable collateral every time rights spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Soren Berg
agents.identity: I am Soren Berg, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Transportation Technology. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so rights cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes utility in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with utility.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to utility to preserve operational rights.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Luc Mensah must choose under rights versus utility. What does Luc Mensah do?
